meaning: n.[美史]平民党员,平民论者,民粹主义者,(美国的)人民党党员
examples: He co-opted many nationalist slogans and cultivated a populist image.
The populist party anointed him as its candidate.
Its old-fashioned populist premise is that businessmen are rogues and guilty until proved innocent.
Further, he adds populist bite to the argument for those who perhaps find oil economics somewhat arcane.
